privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to input specific synthetic data into SciNote. It has been verified through the task description and export scripts that the required inventory name is 'Antibody Stock', the custom column name is 'Catalog Number', and the two items to be added are 'Anti-CD3 mAb' (Catalog Number 'AB-10042') and 'Anti-CD8 mAb' (Catalog Number 'AB-20078'). There is no external dataset; all inputs are provided directly in the prompt.
